goal: Add an activation decision and operator autonomy mode surface that defines read-only, review-only, supervised execution, and full-access behavior. Full access may carry forward without repeated prompts when required evidence is present, while banking, financial transaction, ethics-charter violations, and hard-stop categories remain blocked. This task evaluates only and does not execute actions.
scope_out: Do not call providers, execute runtime, write files/GitHub/database, persist receipts, issue permits, merge, deploy, change packages, change workflows, or alter retired sandbox write routes.
claims: Bluepilot distinguishes read_only, review_only, supervised_execution, and full_access autonomy modes.
Full access can produce execute_allowed without repeated operator prompts when operator grant, ethics charter, safety, executor, and receipt-store evidence are present.
Banking, financial transactions, ethics-charter violations, and other hard-stop categories remain blocked even in full_access.
The surface evaluates execution permission only; it does not perform execution side effects.
assumptions: The canonical ethics charter remains referenced by evidence ref and is not copied into this task.
Actual provider, runtime, write, and persistence execution remain later target-specific activation tasks.
dod: GET /probe/activation-decision-operator-mode-contract returns autonomy modes and hard-stop categories.
POST /probe/activation-decision-operator-mode-preflight can return execute_allowed for full_access with ready evidence and no repeated prompt requirement.
POST /probe/activation-decision-operator-mode-preflight blocks banking and ethics-charter violation categories even in full_access.
Focused tests, typecheck, task-lock verification, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Provider call, runtime execution, file/GitHub/database write, durable persistence, permit issue, merge, deploy, package change, workflow change, or sandbox write reopening becomes necessary.
prior_task_findings: Runtime, provider, write, and durable receipt store preflight surfaces are merged and live. The next layer must decide when full-access grants carry forward without repeated prompts while hard-stop categories remain blocked.
